title: RAG retrieval-mode policy: typed RetrievalMode enum + per-operation routing (folded WP-1-RAG-Retrieval-Mode-Policy)
goal: Define and implement one governed retrieval-mode policy so QueryPlan, RetrievalTrace, Project Brain, Prompt-to-Spec Router, Work Packet loads, and Micro-Task context assembly each choose the cheapest authoritative retrieval path instead of defaulting to hybrid retrieval. Folded from WP-1-RAG-Retrieval-Mode-Policy.
expected_diff_shape: New module src/backend/handshake_core/src/memory/retrieval_mode.rs (RetrievalMode enum + RetrievalModePolicy + RetrievalModeRouter types + RoutingRule). Tests src/backend/handshake_core/tests/retrieval_mode_tests.rs.
unblock_conditions: MT-141/142/143 ship capsule primitives + TaskType + CapsuleBuilder.
implementation_notes: Per WP-1-RAG-Retrieval-Mode-Policy preserved_intent: 'Handshake now has rich retrieval substrates and graph signals, but it still needs explicit no-RAG and lower-cost retrieval rules so exact identifiers, authoritative packet state, bounded local-small-model loops, and freshness-sensitive operations do not get blurred into one generic semantic-search path'. RetrievalMode enum: `pub enum RetrievalMode { NoRag (use the canonical key/id lookup), FullText, Vector, Hybrid, GraphAware, AuthoritativeOnly (read directly from JSON authority file) }`. RoutingRule: `{ id: String, predicate: Box<dyn Fn(&RetrievalContext) -> bool>, mode: RetrievalMode, rationale: String }`. RetrievalModePolicy: `pub struct RetrievalModePolicy { rules: Vec<RoutingRule>, default_mode: RetrievalMode }`. RetrievalModeRouter: `pub fn route(ctx: &RetrievalContext) -> (RetrievalMode, String) { /* return mode + matched rule id or 'default' */ }`. Default policy rules (initial set): (1) exact_uuid_in_query -> NoRag; (2) wp_id_pattern -> AuthoritativeOnly (load packet.json directly); (3) hbr_id_pattern -> AuthoritativeOnly (load HANDSHAKE_BUILD_RULES.json directly); (4) spec_anchor_pattern -> AuthoritativeOnly (load spec module); (5) freshness_sensitive task_type -> Vector + outcome-weighted; (6) general_freeform_query -> Hybrid. CapsuleBuilder (MT-143) MUST consult RetrievalModeRouter before dispatching to retrieval; if NoRag or AuthoritativeOnly, skip embedding lookup entirely and return the typed authoritative item. Tests: every default rule routes correctly to its mode; default applies when no rule matches; router is deterministic; CapsuleBuilder honors the routed mode in fixtures.
risk_if_missed: Without a typed retrieval mode policy every operation defaults to expensive hybrid retrieval; exact-id queries become semantic-search guessing.
validator_focus: RetrievalMode is closed enum; routing is deterministic; default policy rules cover the documented operation classes; CapsuleBuilder consults the router.

minimum_controls: RetrievalMode is a closed enum; widening requires a typed code change.
AuthoritativeOnly rules read JSON authority files directly; cannot fall back to vector search.
Router is deterministic; same context always routes to same mode.
